channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 4 bags of rubble left outside of 42a Neville road N16 0SX, 10th June
item.description:
These 4 bags of rubble have been left outside of 42a Neville road N16 0SX since February 2026 and is not connected to the work conducted on scaffolding in the picture provided which has now been dismantled. Neither has it been left by the resident and LH

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbours hedges and brambles extending across the footpath at the bus stop, 10th June
item.description:
The hedges are so extensive and low that anyone taller than 4ft 11inches has to bend down to avoid being hit in the face. It has been a problem for months but now people have to walk in the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Park Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked Rainwater Gulley, 10th June
item.description:
Blocked drain outside 131 Croydon Road. Please cna this be cleared.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Derelict garages on housing estate being squatted and causing health and safety issues, 10th June
item.description:
We have received the following from one of our business members who's premises backs on to this site: 'On Frazier Street, attached to tooth are some old storage units owned by the council. They are unused. We have constant issues from these re damp and stuff but cannot get access. More recently there is someone living in them. They are regularly on the roof of the units peeking through the window of one of the upstairs tenants but they are also storing a load of things, which we believe to be stolen, lead etc in the units. This has been reported to the police by one of the tenants but as you can well imagine, nothing has been done. Ref number is: CHS 29082 on 10th May 26. ' - Given the garages are on Lambeth housing land (Munro House) it would be useful to be signposted to the relevant team there to help resolve the issue and make the site secure.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frazier Street, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This AA van is a serial offender parking on Red Route causing difficulty at an already busy junction., 10th June
item.description:
Over the past 6 months local residents on this part of Church st N9 opposite the cemetary continuously use the red route to park their cars. Its the same 5 vehicles that do this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Street, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old furniture and household items, 10th June
item.description:
The old sofa has been there over 8 months and the two dirty mattresses has been there over 3 months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Cotmandene Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large conifer needs trimming, 10th June
item.description:
Large conifer needs trimming to reduce encroachment onto pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broxbourne Road, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Directly outside of St George’s House on Bridgeway Street, 10th June
item.description:
Extremely foul odour coming from the drains right outside and along the building, there is also one just instantly on the road outside the red door. The smell is so awful it has caused myself and other residents, particularly on the ground floor to get sick. It smells like sewage and a clog of leaves and dirt inside the drains. Particularly after it has rained and it dries, the drain smell is even worse. Would really appreciate if someone could clean the drains or investigate the smell, it smells like there is dead carcass or something. Thank you so much!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bridgeway Street, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old mattresses left on street by bins, 10th June
item.description:
Mattresses on the street by bins
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cresset Road, Hackney, London

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 10th June
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: PROW needs maintaining due to fire risk, 10th June
item.description:
• Please give brief details of your complaint or compliment below: Next to my house is a walkway which goes from Lockesley Drive through to Oakdene Rd, which is full of weeds long grass etc. This at one point due to a hot summer was set on fire, we lost our fencing a 6ft hedge all the way along, our car caught fire in the drive, our front door panes had blown in, and all our guttering was hanging, the grass at the front was all burnt, we were told had the fire brigade been any later it was that near to going into our loft. We were assured then after that happened the walkway would be kept under control of overgrown greenary. For a while that was kept up. It was then left again for a longer period of time, i got up in the middle of the night and the overgrown stuff was on fire again, i rang the fire brigade, had i not got up that would have caught all our fence alight again. Now we are being forecast hotter weather again in the very near future, and the summer coming, so it will all turn really dry again which happened last time and it only takes a cigarette butt for it all to go up again., Once again it is now really overgrown with people also putting their own cuttings to it all which doesnt help. i would like a request for it to be cut and cleaned up as soon as possible, as it is a real worry to us when its all overgrown and really dry, and then for it to be maintained on a more regular basis as was promised to us after the previous fires. Many Thanks • What action (if any) would you like us to take? I would like it all cut and cleaned up before hot weather arrives and it all goes dry • If yes, and you know who you spoke to please provide details and dates: I have had to call at times before as the maintainance of
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Lockesley Drive, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 59 camden high st signage and balcony, 10th June
